title: GLM-5.2 + Z-Code (Ultra Mode - Free Tier): FABLE LEVEL PERFORMANCE!
summary: A video demonstrates how to configure GLM-5.2 inside Z Code with planning, verification, and MCP workflows to achieve strong coding performance comparable to premium models. The creator advocates for a structured workflow combining exploration, planning, building, verification, review, and patching stages optimized for budget-conscious developers.
writeup: The video walks through configuring GLM-5.2 inside Z Code to reach coding quality comparable to premium models while staying on a free tier. It centers on a structured agent workflow that chains exploration, planning, building, verification, review, and patching, with MCP integration and verification steps doing the heavy lifting. The takeaway is that disciplined planning and verification stages, rather than a more expensive model, can drive strong results for budget-conscious developers.
